title: Hot Honey
why_this_song: Hot Honey by Tiësto (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I try to run, but always come back, I'm stuck on it
Hot honey, always have to wonder what you want from me
Guess it's not enough to stick around (oh no)
Let me down, down, down, down
It's like you, it's like you, it's like you love to let me down
Let me down, down, down, down
This fire in my lungs is burnin' slow

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "keep" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "keep" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: This fire in my lungs is burnin' slow
But you never wanna stick around (oh no)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause you know that I still want you
It's like you love to let me down

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Hot Honey", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Hot Honey", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Hot Honey" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Hot Honey" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Tiësto one question about "Hot Honey", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Tiësto sobre "Hot Honey", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Hot Honey" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Hot Honey" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
